_notes: Phase DX.2 + DX.2f — tunable vocabulary for macOS SwiftUI apps. Smaller than web because SwiftUI has fewer idiomatic tuning points: tint, density spacing, window chrome. Bindings target `swiftui-environment` — the generator embeds `wizard/snippets/macosapp/DesignTokenWatcher.swift` which sets up a DispatchSource file-watcher on /tmp/mchatai-design-tokens/{bundleID}.json. The mChatAI+ Design panel writes that file on every slider drag via DesignTokenSnapshotWriter. Result: live token updates flow into the generated SwiftUI app without a regen, same UX as the web preview. `sidebar-style` remains a partial-live knob — layout-level structural changes (switching NavigationSplitView → TabView) still require regen.

tunables.safetyNote: Driving regeneration-only today. 'sidebar' triggers a NavigationSplitView scaffold; 'tab-bar' triggers TabView; 'none' stays single-window.
